stat.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
stat.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Barrosa pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Barrosa strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Eli White pinch-hit · Fielders Choice
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (force play), call on the field was overturned: Eli White reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Ezequiel Duran. Matt Olson to 3rd. Mauricio Dubón to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.detail: Zach Dezenzo grounds out, second baseman Jackson Holliday to first baseman Pete Alonso.

notableEvents.detail: Tommy Edman homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field.
